headline: Is Rising Institutional Interest in Citizens Financial (CFG) Quietly Reframing Its Earnings Narrative?
summary: In recent days, Citizens Financial Group has drawn attention as analysts highlight a positive Earnings ESP alongside a Zacks Rank of #3 (Hold), while institutional investor Altfest L J & Co. Inc. more than doubled its position in the bank during the fourth quarter. This combination of upbeat earnings expectations, rising institutional ownership, and stronger trading activity points to growing confidence in Citizens Financial Group’s operational and financial positioning. We’ll now examine...
